description_long: This is a modern wristwatch featuring a round dial with a metallic bezel and a dark, textured strap. The watch face is simple, with clear hour markers and three hands for hours, minutes, and seconds, all set against a light background. The strap appears to be made of a durable synthetic material, possibly rubber or silicone, with a series of adjustment holes and a classic buckle closure. The case is relatively slim, and the overall design is utilitarian, suitable for everyday urban wear. The buckle and adjustment holes are visible, indicating a secure and adjustable fit. There are no visible decorative elements or branding on the exterior surfaces.
description: A modern wristwatch with a round metallic dial, light face, and a dark, textured synthetic strap with a buckle closure. The design is simple and functional, ideal for daily urban use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the watch, highlighting the round dial and the extended strap with visible adjustment holes and buckle.
description_view_1: Top-down view focusing on the watch face and the strap extending downward, with the buckle at the top and the adjustment holes visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, showing the round dial and the strap with the buckle on the right side.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view emphasizing the strap's width and the buckle's structure, with the watch face partially visible.
attribute_dial_design: The dial is round with a light background, featuring simple hour markers and three central hands. The design is minimalist with no subdials, numerals, or decorative elements.
attribute_strap_type: Textured synthetic rubber strap with adjustment holes and a classic buckle.
attribute_watch_face_display: Analog display with three hands (hour, minute, second) and clear hour markers. No complications or special features visible.
